compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement PRECONDITIONS schema, preconditions-record.sh, and _write_preconditions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Implement the PRECONDITIONS event schema, the CLI wrapper, and the write helper in ticket-lib.sh.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add _write_preconditions(ticket_id, gate_name, session_id, worktree_id, tier, data_json) to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh using _flock_stage_commit() pattern (model: suggestion-record.sh / emit-review-event.sh)
- [ ] Create plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-record.sh as a CLI wrapper that accepts positional args and calls _write_preconditions
- [ ] Event file written as <ts>-<uuid>-PRECONDITIONS.json in the per-ticket event directory
- [ ] Minimal-tier JSON schema includes: event_type=PRECONDITIONS, gate_name, session_id, worktree_id, tier, timestamp (ISO8601), data (object)
- [ ] All tests in tests/scripts/test-preconditions-record.sh pass GREEN
- [ ] chmod +x applied to preconditions-record.sh

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (add _write_preconditions, _read_latest_preconditions stub)
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-record.sh

## Testing Mode
GREEN — makes T1 tests pass; prerequisite for T5, T6, T7

## Depends On
T1 (b9a7-42a8)

comments.body: Schema clarification from gap analysis: minimal-tier required fields are schema_version=1, manifest_depth=minimal, gate_verdicts[] (composite-keyed by gate_name+session_id+worktree_id), evidence_ref{source_type,pointer,rationale}, affects_fields[]. See story a96b-7ba8 done definition #2.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ All 4 preconditions-record.sh tests pass GREEN
comments.author: Test
